description: A team decides to release a player from their contract. The GM must place the player on waivers.

nodes.task_description: Inform the player and their agent of the team's decision.

expected_outcome.expected: The player and agent are officially notified.

nodes.task_description: Submit the official waiver request to the league office.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully places the player on the league's waiver wire.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the waiver wire to see if the player is claimed by another team.
